title: narcissus bulbocodium subsp. graellsii
intro: Narcissus bulbocodium subsp. graellsii, also known as the Spanish bluebell, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been shown to have potential health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Narcissus bulbocodium subsp. graellsii include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve respiratory health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
